_description: Laminas\Db (formerly Zend\Db) symbol equivalence pack. Extends the stock DbOpRegistry with Laminas DB adapter and statement method names. Laminas DB provides a SQL abstraction layer and database adapters for PHP. Use with --profile=db-aware-laminas together with --db-aware to fold Laminas DB call shapes into the same canonical __DB_<OP>__ tokens as the rest of the recognised DB ecosystem. See https://getlaminas.org/
